2605.00689.title: ML-Bench&Guard: Policy-Grounded Multilingual Safety Benchmark and Guardrail for Large Language Models
2605.00689.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in cross-linguistic contexts, ensuring safety in diverse regulatory and cultural environments has become a critical challenge. However, existing multilingual benchmarks largely rely on general risk taxonomies and machine translation, which confines guardrail models to these predefined categories and hinders their ability to align with region-specific regulations and cultural nuances. To bridge these gaps, we introduce ML-Bench, a policy-grounded multilingual safety benchmark covering 14 languages. ML-Bench is constructed directly from regional regulations, where risk categories and fine-grained rules derived from jurisdiction-specific legal texts are directly used to guide the generation of multilingual safety data, enabling culturally and legally aligned evaluation across languages. Building on ML-Bench, we develop ML-Guard, a Diffusion Large Language Model (dLLM)-based guardrail model that supports multilingual safety judgment and policy-conditioned compliance assessment. ML-Guard has two variants, one 1.5B lightweight model for fast `safe/unsafe' checking and a more capable 7B model for customized compliance checking with detailed explanations. We conduct extensive experiments against 11 strong guardrail baselines across 6 existing multilingual safety benchmarks and our ML-Bench, and show that ML-Guard consistently outperforms prior methods. We hope that ML-Bench and ML-Guard can help advance the development of regulation-aware and culturally aligned multilingual guardrail systems.
2605.00689.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）在跨語言環境中的應用日益增多，確保在多樣的監管和文化環境中安全性已成為一項關鍵挑戰。<lb/>然而，現有的多語言基準在很大程度上依賴於一般風險分類法和機器翻譯，這使得防護模型局限於這些預定義的類別，並妨礙了它們與特定地區的法規和文化細微差別的對齊。<lb/>為了彌補這些空白，我們引入了ML-Bench，這是一個基於政策的多語言安全基準，涵蓋14種語言。<lb/>ML-Bench直接基於區域法規構建，風險類別和從特定司法管轄區的法律文本中派生的細緻規則被直接用來指導多語言安全數據的生成，使得跨語言的評估在文化和法律上保持一致。<lb/>基於ML-Bench，我們開發了ML-Guard，一種基於擴散大型語言模型（dLLM）的防護模型，支持多語言安全判斷和政策條件合規評估。<lb/>ML-Guard有兩個變體，一個是1.5B的輕量級模型，用於快速的`安全/不安全`檢查，另一個是更強大的7B模型，用於具有詳細解釋的定制合規檢查。<lb/>我們對11個強大的防護基準進行了廣泛的實驗，涵蓋6個現有的多語言安全基準和我們的ML-Bench，並顯示ML-Guard始終優於之前的方法。<lb/>我們希望ML-Bench和ML-Guard能幫助推進以法規為導向和文化對齊的多語言防護系統的發展。
2605.00689.author: Yunhan Zhao et.al.
2605.00689.authors: Yunhan Zhao, Zhaorun Chen, Xingjun Ma, Yu-Gang Jiang, Bo Li
